name: gender_role_traditionalism
description: Measures the degree to which respondents endorse traditional, patriarchal norms about gender roles in domestic, economic, and social life, including beliefs about male authority and female subordination.

name: intimate_partner_control_autonomy
description: Captures the extent to which respondents experience or accept control dynamics within romantic partnerships, including financial control, permission-seeking, and decision-making power.

name: tolerance_of_gender_based_violence
description: Measures attitudes toward the acceptability and normalization of physical and emotional violence against women, including justifications for hitting and reactions to domestic conflict.

name: reproductive_autonomy_attitudes
description: Assesses beliefs about reproductive decision-making, including opinions on abortion, unplanned adolescent pregnancy, ideal family size, and who holds authority over pregnancy outcomes.

name: gender_equality_awareness_exposure
description: Measures respondents' exposure to and awareness of gender equality norms and legal frameworks, including knowledge of anti-violence laws, campaigns, and willingness to support women in public roles.
